name: vortos/vortos-framework
description: The Vortos Clean Architecture Framework — meta-package

suggest.vortos/vortos-persistence-dbal: DBAL write repository — choose this or persistence-orm, not both
suggest.vortos/vortos-persistence-orm: Doctrine ORM write repository — choose this or persistence-dbal, not both
suggest.vortos/vortos-persistence-mongo: MongoDB read repository support — requires ext-mongodb
